constraint.description: Finds Require-Bundle entries that cannot be resolved to any bundle in the scanned project. These may indicate missing dependencies.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) WHERE NOT (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, rb.symbolicName AS UnresolvedRequiredBundle ORDER BY bundle.bundleSymbolicName

constraint.description: Finds fragment bundles whose Fragment-Host cannot be resolved to any bundle in the scanned project.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (fragment:Osgi:Fragment) WHERE NOT (fragment)-[:FRAGMENT_OF]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN fragment.bundleSymbolicName AS Fragment, fragment.fragmentHostSymbolicName AS UnresolvedHost ORDER BY fragment.bundleSymbolicName

constraint.description: Detects circular dependencies between bundles via Require-Bundle (A requires B requires A).
constraint.cypher: MATCH (a:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(:Osgi:RequiredBundle)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(b:Osgi:Bundle), (b)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(:Osgi:RequiredBundle)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(a) WHERE id(a) < id(b) RETURN a.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleA, b.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleB ORDER BY a.bundleSymbolicName

constraint.description: Finds OSGi bundles that do not declare a Bundle-Version in their manifest. Every bundle should have an explicit version.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE bundle.bundleVersion IS NULL RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS BundleWithoutVersion ORDER BY bundle.bundleSymbolicName

constraint.description: Finds Import-Package entries that are not satisfied by any Export-Package in the scanned project. Optional imports are excluded.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:IMPORTS_PACKAGE]->(ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) WHERE NOT (ip)<-[:SATISFIES]-(:Osgi:ExportedPackage) AND ip.optional = false RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, ip.fqn AS UnsatisfiedImport ORDER BY bundle.bundleSymbolicName, ip.fqn
